calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Discharged

Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Stephen L. Porter, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 300 Prospect Properties, Inc.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) GGMR COMPANY LLC, dba FOLLICLE HAIR SALON.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

David Wong sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $134,492.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $5,641.00
Attorney's Fees: $3,255.00
Costs: $1,130.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $144,518.00
Judgment signed in open court.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Off Calendar
